messages.content: Fetch https://example.com and summarize what the page contains.

content.text: I'll fetch the content from https://example.com and summarize it for you.

input.code:
import json

# Fetch the content from example.com
result = await web_fetch({"url": "https://example.com"})
parsed = json.loads(result)

# Print key information about the fetch
print("Fetch Type:", parsed[0]["type"])
print("URL:", parsed[0]["url"])
print("Title:", parsed[0]["title"])
print("Content Type:", parsed[0]["content_type"])
print("\n--- Content ---")
print(parsed[0]["content"])

source.data:
Example Domain

# Example Domain

This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission. Avoid use in operations.

[Learn more](https://iana.org/domains/example)

content.text: Let me fix the code - the result structure is different:

input.code:
import json

# Fetch the content from example.com
result = await web_fetch({"url": "https://example.com"})
parsed = json.loads(result)

# Check the structure first
print("Result type:", type(parsed))
if isinstance(parsed, list):
    data = parsed[0]
else:
    data = parsed

# Print key information
print("\nFetch Type:", data.get("type"))
print("URL:", data.get("url"))
print("Title:", data.get("title"))
print("Content Type:", data.get("content_type"))
print("\n--- Content Preview ---")
content = data.get("content", "")
print(content[:500] if len(content) > 500 else content)

source.data:
Example Domain

# Example Domain

This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission. Avoid use in operations.

[Learn more](https://iana.org/domains/example)

# The content is actually a nested structure, let me parse it properly
content_data = eval(data.get("content", "{}"))

print("Page Title:", content_data.get("title"))
print("\nPage Content:")
print(content_data.get("source", {}).get("data"))

input.code:
# Let me check the actual type of content
content = data.get("content")
print("Content type:", type(content))

if isinstance(content, dict):
    print("\nPage Title:", content.get("title"))
    print("\nPage Content:")
    print(content.get("source", {}).get("data"))
else:
    print("\nContent:")
    print(content)

content.text:
## Summary of https://example.com

The page is **Example Domain**, which is a simple demonstration/placeholder website. Here's what it contains:

**Content:**
- **Title**: "Example Domain"
- **Purpose**: This domain is specifically designed for use in documentation examples and testing purposes
- **Key Message**: It explicitly states that this domain can be used in illustrative examples without requiring prior permission or coordination
- **Warning**: It advises to avoid using this domain in operational contexts
- **Link**: Includes a link to learn more at https://iana.org/domains/example (IANA - Internet Assigned Numbers Authority)

This is the well-known example.com domain managed by IANA, which serves as a standard placeholder domain for documentation, tutorials, and testing scenarios where you need a valid domain name but don't want to use a real one.
